meaning: n.[希神]阳间与阴间当中的黑暗界
examples: Those who seek to be Judged, must first complete the trials of Erebus.
"Maybe an appropriate nickname would be Erebus" -ancient Greece's god of darkness.
We made a circle around Ross Island and Mount Erebus and then headed west across the Sound toward Marble Point.
Some points of interest will include McMurdo Sound, the Ross Ice Shelf, the Mertz and Ninnis Glaciers and Mount Erebus.
In 1979, an Air Zealand DC-10 flying from Auckland to the South Pole hit Mount Erebus in Antarctica, killing all 257 people aboard.
